entries.source: What achievement system should we design?
Create badges for consistency, mastery, courage, revision, collaboration, and finished artifacts.
entries.value: Skep kentekens vir konsekwentheid, bemeestering, moed, hersiening, samewerking en voltooide artefakte.

entries.source: Learners exploring gamification topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for badges & achievements with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Hierdie modus is ingestel vir kentekens en prestasies met sy eie aansporings, voorbeelde en leervloei.

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal

entries.source: Create fair leaderboards that reward effort, improvement, teamwork, or consistency without discouraging slower learners.
entries.value: Skep regverdige ranglyste wat moeite, verbetering, spanwerk of konsekwentheid beloon sonder om stadiger leerders te ontmoedig.
